utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget (6 total). The final property solution contains: property (fully specified with type, bedrooms, price, currency), financing (fully specified with purchase method, down payment, loan amount, interest rate, term, fees, currency), legal_services (has service name, cost, currency), moving_services (has service name, cost, currency, included features), setup_services (has utility package type, cost, currency, services included, smart home integration), and total_budget (contains all costs and currency). All six items from the required format are present and fully detailed. The extra 'survey_services' is not part of the required format, but that does not affect the count. Thus, 6/6 items are fully covered.
